Now that we've purchased the domain, it's time to link it up to our funnel. So the first thing that I'm going to do is I'm going to come up to the funnels tab right here and click on funnels in the dropdown. Once my funnels have loaded, I'm going to choose the funnel that I want to start editing. So for us, it's going to be the 42-day detox. For you, it might be the six-week challenge, but the motions to get through this will all be the same. So once I've clicked on this, it's going to pop up an editor for our funnel. So in order to link the domain up, I'm going to go to settings in the upper right-hand corner. And then in this dropdown here where it says domain, I am just going to link the domain up right here. It says set up not completed on mine because it's not an actual domain that we're using. From here in this settings box, you can change the name of your funnel. So we can name it Sabrina's 42-day detox or you can name it really whatever you want. No one sees this but you. And then the group tags, I would suggest removing the shared funnels and then tagging the funnel as what it is. So this funnel would be considered a cold traffic funnel. From here, we're going to go ahead and start cleaning up the pathway. So we've gone over how to link up the domain, how to name the funnel, how to tag it. And now we're doing the URL. So what will be at the end like this of our funnel. So this is going to be our first page. So we'll call it 42-day detox and then whatever works for you. So I'm going to type in Austin because that's where I live. From here, you're going to scroll all the way down to save and update settings. So we're going to click the save button and then we're still going to have to clean up our pathways. So though we changed the path in the settings, it's still not showing up over here. So in order to change that, I'm going to click on this blue cog right here. And I'm going to change the path here as well. So I'm going to call this 42-day detox Austin and I'll click update funnel step. So so far we have our six week challenge domain and the 42-day detox for Austin. We do have one more place that we need to clean up the path and all of our paths need to match in order to get this to work correctly. So the last place is going to be this black gear right here. So I'm going to make this match what I wrote up there. 42-day detox Austin and then I'm going to update the page. As a heads up, sometimes click funnels does not like to save things when you tell it to. So I'm going to double check this cog because it's notorious for a dirty pathway. So entering in letters or numbers at the end of the path. So I'm going to delete these one more time and from here go ahead and update my page. The next thing that I need to do is I need to clear out the pathways on the next page in my funnel, which is the thank you page. So I'm going to go through the same process. I'm going to click on the blue cog right here. And I'm going to edit this page and you can really name this whatever you want. Just keep in mind that your clients will see it. So thank you Austin works for me. We'll click update funnel step. And you can see that the pathway is still dirty up here. So when this happens, this typically means that your pathway is not unique enough. Meaning you need to come up with something else. So we'll try. Thank you everyone. And we'll update our funnel step. And there we go. So no weird letters and numbers when we put it out like that. So let's update it down here in the black cog. So thank you everyone. And update. We'll double check this black cog because we all know it likes to act up. So let's go ahead and delete these numbers. And update the number. Numbers. And update the page. So now that our domain is linked up and our pathways are clear, we are finally ready to start editing our template. So we'll be doing that in our next video.
